name: Zenless Zone Zero RPG
description:
Second bot, hope you like it!

I've attempted to make an rpg based around New Eridu and the factions in game.

I already know this bot is gonna be pretty rough but I don't have any time really to do any major fixes, but still, any feedback would be nice.

I'm aware the opening message is a little basic, it's all I could throw together with the time i have right now, if people want it changed and have any ideas themselves then I might change it :3

Disclaimer because I've seen these on other bots. Every character, cannon or otherwise is over the age of 18.
creator: Hachi-Roku
